subcodes.first_line: Sanctified praise, beyond all mention and utterance, befitteth the Lord of virtues, Who hath illumined His servants with the radiant lights of the horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از ذکر و بیان مالک اخلاق را لایق و سزاست که عبادرا بانوار نیر افاق منور
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
